name: Pre-existing back issues, slipped at work in West Valley—will they pay?
description: Yes for aggravation; medical proof essential.

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing back issues, slipped at work in West Valley—will they pay?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes for aggravation; medical proof essential.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if work aggravated it; comp covers worsening.** Insurers must prove unrelated.[1][4] Key factors: Doctor opinion key. Compare pre/post MRIs. No need to prove 100% caused. Partial credit given. Attorney battles 'pre-existing' denials.
